div.h2: Data Flow: Raw Bytes → sha256_pad() → Indexed Block Array

g.title: Zero-initialise entire sha256_padded_t. Handles zero-fill implicitly.
Copy original message bytes verbatim. Skipped if len==0.
64-bit big-endian bit-length field at last 8 bytes of padded buffer

div.p: Block alignment invariant: total_padded % 64 == 0 data[len] == 0x80 data[−8..−1] = big-endian len×8

g.title: O(1) pointer arithmetic. No copy. Block i starts at byte offset i*64.

div.p: Platform-independent. memcpy of native uint64_t is WRONG on x86 (LE).

g.title: Zero-initialise entire sha256_padded_t. Handles zero-fill implicitly.
Copy original message bytes verbatim. Skipped if len==0.
64-bit big-endian bit-length field at last 8 bytes of padded buffer
O(1) pointer arithmetic. No copy. Block i starts at byte offset i*64.
